title: ChatGPT Chat Basics
description: Learn how to open ChatGPT, find the chat box, send your first prompt, and read the response.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT in a new tab.
steps.coachText: Navigate to chatgpt.com to start using ChatGPT. You may need to log in with your account first.

steps.instruction: Click the chat input area where it says 'Ask anything'.
steps.coachText: This is where you type your messages to ChatGPT. Click it to start typing your first prompt.

steps.instruction: Type a short prompt (e.g., 'What is artificial intelligence?').
steps.coachText: Type any question or instruction. ChatGPT understands natural language, so just write like you're talking to a person.

steps.instruction: Press Enter or click the send button to submit your prompt.
steps.coachText: Click the arrow button or press Enter to send your message. ChatGPT will start generating a response right away.

title: Better Follow-Up Prompts
description: Practice asking follow-up questions to refine and improve ChatGPT's answers.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and locate the chat input area.
steps.coachText: Start a conversation by finding the input box at the bottom of the screen where it says 'Ask anything'.

steps.instruction: Type an initial question (e.g., 'Explain how the internet works').
steps.coachText: Start with a general question. We'll practice refining ChatGPT's answer with follow-up prompts.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for a response.
steps.coachText: After ChatGPT responds, you can ask follow-up questions in the same conversation to get more detail.

steps.instruction: Type a follow-up prompt to refine the answer (e.g., 'Explain that more simply, for a 10-year-old').
steps.coachText: Good follow-ups ask for simpler language, more examples, a different perspective, or a specific format like bullet points. ChatGPT remembers the full conversation.

title: ChatGPT Interface Tour
description: Explore the sidebar, new chat button, model selector, search, and attachment menu to understand what ChatGPT can do.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and find the 'New chat' button in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: The 'New chat' button starts a fresh conversation. Each conversation is saved in the sidebar for you to return to later.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Search chats' option in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Use Search to find any previous conversation by keyword. This is helpful when you have many chats.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Images' link in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: The Images section is a dedicated area for generating and browsing AI-created images using DALL-E. You can try different styles and see your past creations.

steps.instruction: Locate the '+' attachment button next to the chat input.
steps.coachText: The '+' button opens a menu with powerful tools: upload files, create images, enable Thinking mode, Deep Research, and more.

steps.instruction: Click the '+' button to open the tools menu.
steps.coachText: This menu gives you quick access to ChatGPT's advanced features like image creation, file upload, thinking mode, and deep research.

steps.instruction: Review the menu items: Add photos & files, Create image, Thinking, Deep research.
steps.coachText: These are ChatGPT's built-in tools. 'Add photos & files' uploads documents for analysis. 'Create image' generates pictures. 'Thinking' enables step-by-step reasoning. 'Deep research' does thorough multi-source research.

steps.instruction: Find the model selector at the top of the page (it says 'ChatGPT').
steps.coachText: The model selector lets you switch between ChatGPT versions. 'ChatGPT' is the free model for everyday tasks. 'ChatGPT Plus' unlocks the smartest model with advanced capabilities.

title: Generate Images with ChatGPT
description: Learn how to use ChatGPT's DALL-E image generation to create pictures from text descriptions.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the '+' attachment button.
steps.coachText: The '+' button gives you access to image generation. Let's use it to create an AI-generated image.

steps.instruction: Select 'Create image' from the menu.
steps.coachText: This activates DALL-E, ChatGPT's built-in image generation model. Your next prompt will be used to create a picture.

steps.instruction: Type an image description (e.g., 'A cozy coffee shop on a rainy day, watercolor style').
steps.coachText: Describe what you want to see. Include details about subject, setting, style, and mood. More specific prompts create better images.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for the image to be generated.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT will use DALL-E to create your image. This may take a few seconds. The generated image will appear in the chat.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Images' page in the sidebar to see all your generated images.
steps.coachText: The Images page at chatgpt.com/images shows all your past creations, lets you try style presets, and discover creative ideas.

title: Upload & Analyze Files
description: Learn how to upload images, PDFs, and documents for ChatGPT to analyze, summarize, and extract insights from.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the '+' attachment button.
steps.coachText: The '+' button lets you attach files for ChatGPT to read and analyze.

steps.instruction: Select 'Add photos & files' from the menu.
steps.coachText: This option lets you upload images, PDFs, Word documents, spreadsheets, and more. ChatGPT can read and understand the content.

steps.instruction: Select a file from your computer (confirm manually after selecting).
steps.coachText: Pick any file — a photo, PDF, document, or spreadsheet. ChatGPT can analyze text, images, tables, and data.

steps.instruction: Type a prompt about the file (e.g., 'Summarize this document' or 'What does this image show?').
steps.coachText: After attaching your file, tell ChatGPT what you want it to do — summarize, translate, analyze data, extract key points, etc.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for ChatGPT's analysis.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT will process your file and respond with the analysis, summary, or insights you requested.

title: Search the Web with ChatGPT
description: Learn how to use ChatGPT's built-in web browsing to get real-time, up-to-date information with sources.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the chat input area.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT can search the web automatically when your question requires current information. Let's try it.

steps.instruction: Type a question that needs current information (e.g., 'What are the latest news headlines today?').
steps.coachText: When you ask about recent events, prices, weather, or anything time-sensitive, ChatGPT will automatically search the web and cite its sources.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and watch ChatGPT search the web.
steps.coachText: You'll see ChatGPT indicate it's 'searching the web' before composing its answer. The response will include source links you can click to verify.

steps.instruction: Look for source citations in the response — they appear as numbered links.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT adds numbered source links [1], [2], etc. to its web-searched answers. Click any link to visit the original source and verify the information.

title: Thinking Mode for Complex Problems
description: Learn how to activate Thinking mode so ChatGPT reasons step-by-step through complex problems.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the '+' attachment button.
steps.coachText: Thinking mode is available in the '+' menu. It enables deeper reasoning for complex questions.

steps.instruction: Select 'Thinking' from the menu.
steps.coachText: Thinking mode makes ChatGPT reason step-by-step before answering. It's ideal for math, logic puzzles, and complex analysis.

steps.instruction: Type a complex question (e.g., 'I have 3 boxes. Box A has apples, Box B has oranges, Box C has both. Each label is wrong. I pick one fruit from Box C and it is an apple. What is in each box?').
steps.coachText: Give ChatGPT a problem that requires logical reasoning. Thinking mode will show you its step-by-step thought process.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and observe the thinking process.
steps.coachText: Watch how Thinking mode breaks down the problem step-by-step. You'll see the reasoning chain before the final answer, showing how ChatGPT reached its conclusion.

steps.instruction: Look for the expandable 'Thought for X seconds' section to see the full reasoning.
steps.coachText: Click on the 'Thought for X seconds' toggle to see ChatGPT's complete internal reasoning chain. This transparency helps you understand and verify the answer.

title: Deep Research Mode
description: Learn how to use Deep Research for comprehensive, multi-source research reports with citations.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the '+' attachment button.
steps.coachText: Deep Research is available in the '+' menu. It conducts thorough research across multiple web sources.

steps.instruction: Select 'Deep research' from the menu.
steps.coachText: Deep Research tasks ChatGPT with a comprehensive investigation using multiple sources. It takes longer but produces detailed, well-cited reports.

steps.instruction: Type a research question (e.g., 'Compare the pros and cons of electric vehicles vs hybrid vehicles for daily commuting').
steps.coachText: Be specific about your research topic. The more focused your question, the more useful the research report will be.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and wait for the research plan or clarifying questions.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT may first present a research plan or ask clarifying questions before starting. This ensures the research matches your needs.

steps.instruction: Review the sources cited in the research response.
steps.coachText: Deep Research provides numbered source citations throughout the report. Each source can be clicked to visit the original page and verify the information.

title: Mastering Response Controls
description: Learn how to copy, regenerate, read aloud, rate, and share ChatGPT's responses.

steps.instruction: Send any prompt to ChatGPT to get a response.
steps.coachText: Type any question to generate a response. We'll explore the action buttons that appear below every response.

steps.instruction: Wait for ChatGPT's response to appear.
steps.coachText: Once the response is complete, you'll see action buttons appear below it for copying, rating, and more.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Copy' button below the response.
steps.coachText: The Copy button copies the entire response text to your clipboard. Use it to quickly paste ChatGPT's answers into documents, emails, or notes.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Read aloud' button (speaker icon).
steps.coachText: Read Aloud makes ChatGPT speak the response out loud using text-to-speech. It's great for listening while multitasking or for accessibility.

steps.instruction: Find the thumbs up and thumbs down feedback buttons.
steps.coachText: Use the thumbs up (Good response) and thumbs down (Bad response) buttons to give feedback. This helps OpenAI improve ChatGPT's responses over time.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Regenerate' button (circular arrow icon).
steps.coachText: Regenerate creates a completely new response to the same prompt. If the first answer wasn't what you wanted, try regenerating instead of asking again.

title: Explore Custom GPTs
description: Discover the GPT Store and learn how to find and use specialized AI assistants built by the community.

steps.instruction: Find and click 'Explore GPTs' in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: The GPT Store contains thousands of specialized ChatGPT bots built by the community. Each GPT is customized for specific tasks like writing, coding, design, and more.

steps.instruction: Browse the GPT Store categories.
steps.coachText: The GPT Store is organized into categories like Writing, Productivity, Research & Analysis, Education, and more. Browse to discover GPTs relevant to you.

steps.instruction: Click the search box and type a topic (e.g., 'language learning').
steps.coachText: Use the search bar to find GPTs for any topic. Try searching for something you're interested in — there are GPTs for cooking, fitness, coding, resume writing, and much more.

steps.instruction: Browse the search results and click on a GPT that interests you.
steps.coachText: Each GPT card shows its name, description, and how many people have used it. Click one to learn more or start chatting with it.

steps.instruction: Return to the main ChatGPT page by clicking 'New chat' or the ChatGPT logo.
steps.coachText: You can always return to the regular ChatGPT by clicking 'New chat' in the sidebar or the ChatGPT logo. Your GPT conversations are saved separately.

title: Shopping Research
description: Use ChatGPT's Shopping Research tool to compare products, find deals, and make smarter purchasing decisions.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and click the '+' attachment button.
steps.coachText: The '+' menu includes a Shopping Research tool that helps you compare products and find the best deals.

steps.instruction: Select 'Shopping research' from the menu.
steps.coachText: Shopping Research mode optimizes ChatGPT to search for products, compare prices, read reviews, and recommend the best options for your needs.

steps.instruction: Type a shopping query (e.g., 'Best noise-cancelling headphones under $200').
steps.coachText: Be specific about what you're looking for — include budget, features, and use case. The more detail you give, the better the recommendations.

steps.instruction: Send the prompt and review the product recommendations.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT will search the web for products, compare prices and reviews, and present organized recommendations with pros and cons.

title: The Images Page
description: Use the dedicated Images page to create art with style presets, explore creative prompts, and manage your image gallery.

steps.instruction: Find and click 'Images' in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: The Images page is a dedicated space for creating and managing AI-generated images with style presets and creative inspiration.

steps.instruction: Explore the 'Try a style on an image' section with style presets.
steps.coachText: The Images page shows style presets like Caricature, Watercolor, Gold, and more. You can apply these styles to transform your photos or create new art.

steps.instruction: Browse the 'Discover something new' section for creative prompt ideas.
steps.coachText: This section shows trending image ideas like 'Me as an emperor', 'Style me', or 'Create a professional product photo'. Click any to try it.

steps.instruction: Type an image description in the input box (e.g., 'A sunset over mountains in oil painting style').
steps.coachText: The Images page has its own dedicated input for creating images. Describe what you want to see — include subject, style, colors, and mood.

steps.instruction: Scroll down to see the 'My images' gallery with your past creations.
steps.coachText: The 'My images' section shows all your previously generated images. Click any to view full-size, download, or create variations.

title: Organize with Projects
description: Create a ChatGPT Project to organize related chats, files, and custom instructions into focused workspaces.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Projects' section in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Projects are workspaces that group related chats, files, and custom instructions together. They keep your work organized by topic or task.

steps.instruction: Click 'New project' to create a workspace.
steps.coachText: Each project gets its own name, custom instructions, and file storage. Create projects for different workflows like 'Marketing Campaign' or 'Learning Python'.

steps.instruction: Give your project a name and description.
steps.coachText: Name your project something descriptive. You can add custom instructions that apply only to chats within this project.

steps.instruction: Start a chat inside the project by typing a message.
steps.coachText: Chats created inside a project stay organized together. The project's custom instructions automatically apply to every chat within it.

steps.instruction: Return to the sidebar and find your project listed under 'Projects'.
steps.coachText: Your project now appears in the sidebar. Click it anytime to see all related chats and files.

title: Connect Third-Party Apps
description: Connect ChatGPT to external apps like Canva, Photoshop, and Replit to extend its capabilities.

steps.instruction: Find and click 'Apps' in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT can connect to third-party apps, letting you use tools like Canva, Adobe Photoshop, and Replit directly in conversations.

steps.instruction: Browse the available app integrations.
steps.coachText: The Apps page shows all available integrations. Each app adds new capabilities — design graphics with Canva, edit photos with Photoshop, or build apps with Replit.

steps.instruction: Click on an app to learn what it does (e.g., Canva).
steps.coachText: Each app card shows what it can do. Canva creates social media posts and presentations. Replit builds and runs code. Click to see details.

steps.instruction: Return to a chat and try mentioning an app (e.g., 'Create a social media post about AI using Canva').
steps.coachText: When you mention a connected app in your prompt, ChatGPT will use it to perform the task — design graphics, edit images, write code, all within the conversation.

title: Voice Conversations
description: Use voice dictation and Advanced Voice mode for hands-free AI conversations.

steps.instruction: Open ChatGPT and find the microphone icon in the input area.
steps.coachText: The microphone button lets you dictate messages using speech-to-text. Great for longer messages or when you prefer talking over typing.

steps.instruction: Find the Advanced Voice mode button (the waveform icon).
steps.coachText: Advanced Voice mode enables real-time, natural voice conversations with ChatGPT. It can hear you, respond verbally, and understand tone.

steps.instruction: Click the microphone button to start dictating a message.
steps.coachText: Speak clearly and naturally — ChatGPT will transcribe your speech into text in the input box. You can review and edit before sending.

steps.instruction: Say something (e.g., 'Tell me about the solar system') and send the transcribed message.
steps.coachText: After dictating, your words appear as text. Review, edit if needed, and send. Voice input is perfect for brainstorming and accessibility.

title: Set Up Memory & Personalization
description: Configure ChatGPT's memory, tone, and custom instructions so it works the way you prefer.

steps.instruction: Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner of the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Your profile menu gives access to personalization settings, memory management, and custom instructions.

steps.instruction: Click 'Personalization' from the menu.
steps.coachText: Personalization settings let you set your preferred tone, style, and format for all ChatGPT responses.

steps.instruction: Explore the tone and style options (e.g., Warm, Professional, Enthusiastic).
steps.coachText: Set a 'Base style' like Chatty, Formal, or Concise, and a 'Tone' like Encouraging or Direct. These apply to all future conversations.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Memory' section to see what ChatGPT remembers about you.
steps.coachText: ChatGPT's Memory stores facts it learns across conversations — your job, preferences, writing style. You can view, edit, or delete memories.

steps.instruction: Close settings and test personalization by asking ChatGPT something.
steps.coachText: Your personalization settings take effect immediately. Try asking ChatGPT a question and notice the tone and style match your preferences.

title: Collaborate in Group Chats
description: Create a group chat where multiple people and ChatGPT can collaborate together in real time.

steps.instruction: Find the 'Group chats' section at the bottom of the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Group Chats let you invite others into a shared conversation with ChatGPT. Everyone can contribute, and ChatGPT participates as a team member.

steps.instruction: Click 'New group chat' to start a collaborative session.
steps.coachText: A group chat creates a shared space where you and others brainstorm, plan projects, or learn together with ChatGPT's assistance.

steps.instruction: Explore the group chat setup options.
steps.coachText: You can name your group chat, invite participants via email or link, and optionally add a custom GPT to specialize the chat.

steps.instruction: Type a message in the group chat to send to all participants.
steps.coachText: Messages in group chats are visible to everyone. ChatGPT responds to anyone in the group — perfect for team brainstorming or study groups.

title: Explore Codex
description: Discover ChatGPT's Codex — a code-centric environment with automations, skills, and specialized coding threads.

steps.instruction: Find and click 'Codex' in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Codex is ChatGPT's specialized coding environment with a focused interface for writing, debugging, and running code with AI assistance.

steps.instruction: Browse the Codex interface — explore Automations, Skills, and Threads.
steps.coachText: Codex offers three areas: Automations (recurring tasks), Skills (reusable code patterns), and Threads (focused coding conversations). It's like an AI-powered IDE.

steps.instruction: Look for the desktop app download option.
steps.coachText: Codex is also available as a macOS desktop app, providing a native IDE-like experience integrated with your local development environment.

steps.instruction: Start a coding thread by typing a programming question.
steps.coachText: Codex excels at writing functions, debugging errors, explaining code, and building full applications. Try a coding question.

steps.instruction: Return to regular ChatGPT by clicking 'New chat' in the sidebar.
steps.coachText: Switch between Codex and regular ChatGPT anytime. Codex conversations are saved separately so your coding work stays organized.
